name: GET /api/draft/config/frontend/schema
statusMessage: 1. Test Case ID: Wf1ybt  - Undocumented HTTP status code      Received: 400     Documented: 403, 500, 200, 429, 503, 422, 401  [400] Bad Request:  Reproduce with:       curl -X GET -H '0: ' http://0.0.0.0:3030/api/draft/config/frontend/schema  2. Test Case ID: jxsUKh  - Accepted negative data      Allowed statuses: 400, 401, 403, 404, 422, 5xx  [200] OK:      `{"sentry":null}`  Reproduce with:       curl -X GET -H '0: ' http://0.0.0.0:3030/api/draft/config/frontend/schema  3. Test Case ID: Jk2mGd  - Authentication declared but not enforced for this operation      The API returned `200 OK` for `GET /api/draft/config/frontend/schema` with invalid auth.  - Response violates schema      None is not of type 'object'      Schema at /properties/sentry/allOf/0:          {             "type": "object",             "description": "Frontend configuration for Sentry.",             "required": [                 "dsn"             ],             "properties": {                 "dsn": {                     "type": "string",                     "description": "The Data Source Name (DSN) for Sentry.",                     "maxLength": 100,                     "pattern": "^https?://"                 },                 "release": {                     "type": "string",                     "description": "A version of the code deployed to an environment.",                     "maxLength": 100,                     "pattern": "^[0-9a-zA-Z].*$"                 },             // Output truncated...         }      Value:          null  [200] OK:      `{"sentry":null}`  Reproduce with:       curl -X GET -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' http://0.0.0.0:3030/api/draft/config/frontend/schema
